title: Keel Agent Phase Output
description: Contract for the output file each Keel phase agent writes to .keel/state/<story-id>/<NN>-<agent>.json. This is how agents pass context to each other.

story_id.description: Story identifier, e.g. FEAT-1 or HART-287

findings.description: What the phase concluded, decided, or discovered. Reference file paths and identifiers — never inline file contents.

acceptance_criteria_ids.description: Acceptance criteria this phase addresses. Phase 1 (product-owner) defines the full set; every later phase must account for all of them. Dropping an AC without a documented descope decision is drift and fails the handshake gate.

decisions.description: Decisions made this phase with one-line rationale (audited)

artifacts.description: Repo-relative paths to files this phase produced or changed

next_phase.description: Phase that should run next; null when the pipeline is complete

blockers.description: Anything preventing the next phase from starting
